details.description:
Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2; 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

details.description:
Bright; Versatile 2.5BR / 1.5BA Duplex with Outdoor Space in Bushwick
Located on a quiet, tree-lined street in the heart of Bushwick, this unique duplex apartment offers tons of space and flexibility just moments from the L and M trains at DeKalb and Knickerbocker.
Upstairs you?ll find two sunny bedrooms, a full modern bathroom, and a renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a dishwasher. The lower level opens into a huge bonus space with a private half bath?great for a studio setup, extra living area, or workspace.
Details like exposed brick, hardwood floors, and high ceilings give this home its charm, while a shared backyard adds room to unwind or entertain outdoors.
Features:
Spacious duplex layout
Exposed brick; hardwood floors
High ceilings
Renovated kitchen w/ dishwasher
Bonus lower level w/ half bath
Shared backyard
Pets case by case

Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

details.description:
77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

details.description:
Introducing 242 Newkirk, located in Kensington, right off the historical Ocean Parkway. 242 Newkirk is a brand new luxury building offering 44 rental units.
All units feature oversized windows, high-end modern appliances, gorgeous hardwood floors, and tasteful finishes throughout. Select units provide spacious balconies, patios, or private backyard spaces.
Amenities include a furnished roof deck, gym, elevator, laundry room, and bike storage.
Ideally located on Newkirk Avenue just off Ocean Parkway, you will have easy access to the B and Q trains at Newkirk Plaza as well as the F train at 18th Avenue. Prospect Park is just a 10 minute bike ride away.
Welcome home.

details.description:
Experience upscale living at 1359 Nostrand Ave in Flatbush!
This newly built home boasts modern design elements like hardwood floors and high ceilings. The kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances, stone countertops, and a dishwasher. Building amenities include a rooftop deck with city views, a bike room, a virtual doorman, and laundry.
The prime Flatbush location puts you near great dining, nightlife, shops, and Prospect Park, with easy access to the 2, 5, B, and Q trains.
Pets are welcome, and guarantors are accepted.
Schedule a showing now!

details.description:
Elevated Living at 527 Grand Ave in Prospect Heights
2 bedroom with 2 bath
Welcome to 527 Grand Ave, a luxury community perfectly nestled in the vibrant Prospect Heights neighborhood. Offering 1 and 2 bedroom residences with spacious layouts, premium finishes, and thoughtful design, this property redefines modern living. Tons of natural sunlight throughout.
Residents enjoy unparalleled amenities, including: - A state-of-the-art fitness center - Expansive rooftop terrace with stunning skyline views - Dedicated children?s playroom - Business conference room for remote work and meetings - Convenient elevator access
Neighborhood Highlights: Prospect Heights is a blend of historic charm and contemporary culture. Stroll down tree-lined streets to uncover trendy restaurants, cozy cafes, and boutique shops. The iconic Prospect Park, Brooklyn Botanic Garden, and Brooklyn Museum are just steps away, offering lush green spaces and endless cultural experiences. Excellent transit options, including the A and C trains, make commuting to Manhattan and other parts of Brooklyn a breeze.
Live where convenience meets character. Schedule your tour today and make 527 Grand Ave your new home!

details.description:
? One Fifty Lawrence ? Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Welcome to One Fifty Lawrence, a modern 25-story tower redefining Brooklyn living. Nestled between Fulton and Willoughby Streets, this striking new residence blends refined design, thoughtful amenities, and unbeatable convenience ? just steps from the Jay St?MetroTech subway hub.
Inside, discover bright studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments with expansive windows, high ceilings, and sleek finishes. Each home is crafted for comfort and style, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, in-unit laundry, and energy-efficient systems.
Residents enjoy access to an impressive amenity collection: a state-of-the-art fitness center, rooftop terrace with sweeping skyline views, resident lounge, and co-working spaces ? all within a pet-friendly community.
At One Fifty Lawrence, you?re surrounded by everything Downtown Brooklyn offers ? premier shopping, dining, and cultural destinations ? while being minutes from Manhattan and the rest of the borough.
Modern design. Urban energy. Unmatched convenience. This is One Fifty Lawrence.

details.description:
The perfect spot for a central Williamsburg vibe in a slightly quieter area! Don't worry though, that busy waterfront is only a short walk away :) Find all the restaurants, coffee shops, bars, art and music venues, plant shops, parks, farmers markets, grocers, and absolutely anything and everything else you could desire right outside your door. East Williamsburg is still an amazing, diverse, and community-centered neighborhood with great accessibility to almost any other Brooklyn area and a very easy commute to Manhattan. Conveniently located off the L, J. M, and G trains, as well as the B43, B46, B48, and B60 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat
BUILDING FEATURES: Laundry Room Finished Roof Deck

details.description:
----- Luxury STUDIO, available now ------
Housed in what was formerly known as the Empire State Dairy Company, The Highland is one of Brooklyn?s most recent landmarked buildings. Steeped in rich history, The residence now spans 14 stories and offers Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom homes.
Our units feature ? Modern Elegant Kitchens ? Quartz Countertops ? Stainless Steel Appliances ? Panelized Dishwashers ? In-unit washer/dryer ? Floor- to- ceiling windows ? White Oak Flooring ? Mini split heating/cooling system
Bathroom features include ? White Oak Vanities ? Floor-to-ceiling grooved ceramic wall tiles ? Deep soaking tub ? Stone style floor tiles
Our building features ? Laundry room ? Bike Storage ? Resident Lounge ? Business Center ? Kids Playroom ? Fitness Center ? Rooftop Lounge ? Two Outdoor Terraces
Located just south of Highland Park, Cypress Hills is home to passionate individuals who share a strong appreciation for their neighborhood due to its rich and vibrant history, local bars, restaurants, and cafes, and community gardens, parks, and green spaces. Boasting 101 acres, Highland Park is situated on a high plateau and offers stunning views of the Ridgewood Reservoir, Rockaways, and Atlantic Ocean. Additional parks and green spaces include Shirley Chisholm State Park, Hamilton Beach Park, Sperandeo Brothers Playground, the Herbal Garden of East New York, George Walker Jr. Park, Martin Luther King Jr. Playground, Grace Playground, Noakhali Cricket Field, and Sutter Ballfields.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Experience Brooklyn?s newest modern residences at The Rocklyn, coming soon to the heart of Fort Greene. Designed for contemporary living, these sophisticated homes offer premium finishes, sleek design, and top-tier amenities in a prime location.
Elevated Living, Thoughtfully Designed
? Expansive layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows for abundant natural light ? European white oak flooring for a warm, timeless aesthetic ? Caesarstone quartz countertops paired with designer cabinetry ? High-end stainless steel appliances for a seamless culinary experience ? Spa-inspired bathrooms featuring backlit LED mirrors Unmatched Location; Convenience
Nestled in Fort Greene, The Rocklyn is just steps from renowned dining, premier shopping, and multiple subway lines, ensuring effortless city access.

details.description:
The Westmark is a new three-tower development that brings something genuinely different to Brooklyn: signature arched architecture, a landscaped connecting courtyard shared by all residents, and a location that puts Carroll Gardens dining, Whole Foods, and Prospect Park within easy reach. Studios, one-bedrooms, and two-bedrooms are available now ? many with private balconies, terraces, or wraparound terraces with open city views.
Inside your home Floor-to-ceiling windows flood every residence with natural light. Finishes are high-end throughout: custom Italian cabinetry, stone countertops, premium stainless appliances, wide-plank oak flooring, integrated Bluetooth speakers with per-room volume control, and in-unit washer/dryer. Bathrooms are spa-finished with custom vanities and designer tile.
Amenities - 24/7 concierge lobby ? Grand entrance, package handling, secure bike storage - Rooftop + sky lounge ? Sweeping skyline views, cabana seating, outdoor lounge - Fitness + yoga studio ? Full fitness center with dedicated yoga space - Work + social spaces ? Co-working lounge, library, game lounge, movie room - Resident lounge ? Expansive lounge + kids playroom
*Apartment images shown may not represent the actual unit and or view of the apartment listed. Please inquire for more information.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C

details.description:
Discover The Arcadian, Crown Heights newest luxury rental destination, where elevated design meets everyday comfort. This exceptional full-service residence offers modern homes paired with an impressive suite of indoor and outdoor amenities.
Each residence features a Frigidaire stainless steel kitchen appliance package with electric range, black quartz countertops, ceramic kitchen and bath tiles, engineered American oak wood flooring, and oversized windows that fill each home with natural light.
Enjoy a 24/7 attended lobby, on-site parking, and thoughtfully curated spaces to relax, work, and play including a state-of-the-art fitness center, yoga studio, media and game rooms, karaoke lounge, DIY workshop, and co-working suite.
Outdoors, unwind in the landscaped courtyard or on the rooftop deck with BBQ grills, or stay active on the half basketball court and pickleball court. A childrens playroom and dog run complete the lifestyle offering.
Situated along vibrant Nostrand Avenue, The Arcadian is moments from Prospect Park, Brooklyn Botanic Garden, and the 2, 5, and Q trains for effortless access across Brooklyn and Manhattan.
The Arcadian a modern haven of style, comfort, and connection in the heart of Crown Heights.
**Photos advertised are model units**
In compliance with the FARE Act, the following fees apply:
Application Fee: $20 per applicant Security Deposit: Equal to One Month's Rent One Month Rent due upfront at Lease Signing Resident is responsible for electric, HVAC, cable and internet. Lockout Fees may apply Additional Amenity Fees: $75. Offering discounted to $5 for the initial term Legal fees may apply if in default Additional optional parking fee may apply

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C

details.description: Breathtakingly beautiful luxury 1 bedroom apartment in the environmentally friendly Parkline. Designed to satisfy LEED Gold and Energy Star standards, The Parkline has the distinction of being one of the greenest buildings in Brooklyn. Literally just a stroll from the tranquil beauty of Prospect Park and the B/Q trains for easy commute into Manhattan. Call me today and we can arrange a viewing!

Breathtakingly beautiful luxury 1 bedroom apartment in the environmentally friendly Parkline. Designed to satisfy LEED Gold and Energy Star standards, The Parkline has the distinction of being one of the greenest buildings in Brooklyn. Literally just a stroll from the tranquil beauty of Prospect Park and the B/Q trains for easy commute into Manhattan. Call me today and we can arrange a viewing!

In the bustling neighborhood of East Williamsburg, you will feel a perfect blend of old school and new. Find authentic family-owned small eateries next to newly opened rave-reviewed restaurants. Visit trusted long-standing dive bars next to upscale cocktail clubs. Go shopping all along Graham and Flushing Avenues and take a short walk to the Williamsburg Waterfront!
Conveniently located off the L, J, M, and G trains, as well as the B43, B46, B48, B60, Q54, and Q59 bus routes.
FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Shared Roof Deck Pet Friendly

Extra large corner unit 1 bedroom apartment brimming with charm in a prime location. Hardwood floors, oversized windows, and original exposed brick throughout offer an inspiring living space for all of your needs! The kitchen is clean with nicely finished white appliances and cabinets, and the bedroom is *king-size* with multiple windows. Great storage throughout the apartment includes two closets. Full bathroom with a tub is the cherry on top!
You'll love the incredible location on one of the most desirable BK Heights blocks. Grab a beverage at the popular Vineapple Cafe right downstairs, and then you're just steps away from Cadman Plaza Park, the Brooklyn Bridge Park+Roller Rink, and everything else in Downtown Brooklyn. Manhattan is just minutes away, with super easy via the 2, 3, and A trains, as well as the Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges. Message me to view today!

This 2 bedroom/ 1 bath apartment features modern finishes, stainless steel appliances, hardwood floors, and split A/C unit. Enjoy the convenience of laundry in the building.
Conveniently located near the A/C/2/3/4 trains for easy commuting. Plenty of grocery stores, pharmacies, restaurants and more are located right nearby.
Schedule your showing today!

The open-plan living and dining area is spacious and airy, with plenty of room for entertaining and relaxation. The kitchen has modern appliances, including a gas stove, refrigerator, and dishwasher, and features plenty of counter and cabinet space.
The bedroom is generously sized, with ample space for a queen-sized bed and other furniture. The bathroom has been recently updated with new fixtures and finishes, including a modern vanity and a shower/tub combo.
The building has a live-in superintendent and offers amenities such as a laundry room and a bike storage area. It is conveniently located near several subway lines, including the 2, 3, 4, and 5 trains, providing easy access to Manhattan and other parts of Brooklyn. There are also many restaurants, bars, and shops in the area, making it a great neighborhood for those who love to explore.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

No need to choose between Bushwick and BedStuy with this one! Live right on that line and enjoy one of the quickest growing and most popular neighborhoods today. With all the conveniences of and Broadway right outside and Myrtle Avenue just down the street, you'll have everything you need nearby. Quickly walk to a HUGE grocer (such a luxury in Brooklyn), bars and restaurants galore, and the easiest transportation ever!
Conveniently located off the J and M trains as well as the B15, B38, B46, B47, and B54 bus routes.
FEATURES:Washer/Dryer IN UNIT! Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat Shared Roof Deck Pet Friendly

details.description:
Some of BedStuy's absolute best restaurant, bar, and coffee choices are right here off Bedford-Nostrand! This lively neighborhood will cater to all of your needs and more. With Herbert Von King park just down the street, bodegas on every other corner where they'll know you by name, and beautiful brownstones lining the streets, you get to enjoy the true history and culture of BedStuy, Brooklyn. Not to mention FULL SIZE grocers to both your right and your left, reallyyy upping the NYC convenience level!
Conveniently located right off the G train as well as the B38, B43, B44, and B52 bus routes.
FEATURES: Washer/Dryer IN UNIT! Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat Pet Friendly

details.description:
2 Bed / 1 Bath at 921 Gates Ave ? Unit: 3F in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn. All Pets Allowed. Nearby subway stations include: Kosciuszko St (J). Great size 2br with 1 full bathroom. Unit Ac/heat in every room. The building has shared roof deck and yard. Located just a few blocks from subway. Close to everything you need. We can help you find roommates on Nooklyn.

details.description:
Welcome to 316 Patchen Avenue, a boutique Brooklyn residence nestled on a charming tree-lined block in the heart of Bedford-Stuyvesant.
Offering the perfect blend of neighborhood character and city convenience, this thoughtfully maintained building places residents in one of Brooklyn?s most beloved communities. Surrounded by beautiful brownstones, local cafes, restaurants, parks, and neighborhood favorites, you?ll enjoy the vibrant atmosphere that has made Bed-Stuy one of New York City?s most desirable places to call home.
Whether you?re grabbing coffee from a nearby caf?, enjoying dinner at a local restaurant, or exploring the neighborhood?s rich history and culture, everything you need is just moments away. Convenient access to public transportation makes commuting throughout Brooklyn and Manhattan simple and efficient.
316 Patchen Avenue offers residents the opportunity to experience authentic Brooklyn living while enjoying the convenience of a well-positioned home in a thriving neighborhood.
Experience the best of Bed-Stuy at 316 Patchen Avenue.

details.description:
Welcome to 2913 Snyder Avenue, a modern full-service residence designed to elevate your everyday living experience in the heart of Brooklyn.
This thoughtfully appointed elevator building offers an impressive collection of amenities tailored to today?s lifestyle. Stay active without leaving home in the fully equipped fitness center, work remotely from the dedicated co-working space, and enjoy the convenience of on-site parking and secure bike storage.
When it?s time to unwind, head to the beautifully furnished rooftop terrace, where you can relax, socialize, enjoy outdoor dining, or take in sweeping views of the surrounding neighborhood.
Perfectly situated with easy access to local shopping, dining, parks, and public transportation, 2913 Snyder Avenue combines comfort, convenience, and modern amenities in one exceptional address.

Modern Living at 815 Flatbush Ave!
Experience elevated living in this stylish 2-bedroom apartment with a private balcony and stunning views. The sleek kitchen features ample storage, high-end appliances, a microwave, and a dishwasher. Enjoy a spa-like bathroom, in-unit washer/dryer, and access to a common laundry room.

Steps to the Maria Hernandez Park! and the L train line!

details.description:
Welcome to 61 Malcolm X Boulevard, a boutique 10-unit building offering modern Brooklyn living with exceptional indoor and outdoor space.
This spacious 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom duplex is thoughtfully designed across two levels, featuring three generously sized bedrooms on the main floor and an expansive lower level that provides endless possibilities for a media room, home office, gym, playroom, or guest suite.
The home boasts a large private backyard, perfect for entertaining, dining al fresco, gardening, or simply enjoying your own outdoor retreat in the city. Inside, you?ll find modern conveniences including split-system heating and cooling units in every room for year-round comfort, a dishwasher, and three full bathrooms for maximum flexibility and convenience.
With its versatile layout, abundant living space, and private outdoor oasis, this unique duplex offers the feel of a townhouse while enjoying the benefits of a boutique residential building.
Located on Malcolm X Boulevard in the heart of Bedford-Stuyvesant, you?ll be surrounded by neighborhood favorites, local cafes, parks, and convenient transportation options.

amenities.other: A/C, Above "8" ceilings, Dishwasher, Backyard

details.description:
Welcome home to this spacious 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom residence at 484 Harman Street, a boutique 8-unit building located in the heart of Bushwick.
This thoughtfully designed apartment features three well-proportioned bedrooms, a bright living area, and modern finishes throughout. The kitchen is equipped with a dishwasher, making daily living and entertaining effortless. Split-system heating and cooling units provide year-round comfort and allow you to control the temperature in your home with ease.
Residents also enjoy the convenience of laundry facilities within the building.
Nestled on a charming residential block, you?ll be surrounded by Bushwick?s vibrant mix of cafes, restaurants, nightlife, and local shops. With convenient access to public transportation, commuting throughout Brooklyn and Manhattan is simple and efficient.

Don?t miss the opportunity to call one of Brooklyn?s most exciting neighborhoods home.
